description: Multi-source ground truth with explicit AGT/SGT/PGT/MGT/CGT taxonomy and 9-tier weighted consensus. See docs/pipeline_and_gt_spec.md §3-4.

generation_method.channel_note: LCGT uses LLM pretraining knowledge of published literary criticism. Distinct channel from Stage 04 consensus (in-book evidence packs). the paper PIF on LCGT-backed books should be reported separately from AGT/MGT/PGT-backed books.
